effects.effect: Conjure a small splash of water in your hand or at a point within short range. Enough to wet a surface, clean a wound, fill a cup, or put out a candle. Cannot hydrate a creature.
Conjure up to 1 gallon of clean drinkable water at a point within short range. Can fill containers, extinguish small flames, or hydrate creatures normally. Lasts until consumed or 10 minutes pass.

Conjure a wave of water that crashes forward in a short range line. Each creature in the line takes [[2d6]] fluid damage and must succeed on a Physical check or be knocked back 20ft, half per success. The area becomes difficult terrain and extinguishes flames and exposed light sources until the end of your next turn.

Conjure a massive wave that crashes outward in a short range around you. Each creature in the area takes [[4d6 ]] fluid damage and must succeed on a Physical check or be knocked back 60ft and gain the Prone condition, half damage and knockback per success. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute and extinguishes all flames and light sources until the end of your next turn.
Create a barrier in an unoccupied space within short range. The barrier is 5 ft by 10 ft (horizontal or vertical), has 15 armor, and takes the shape of a straight wall. It lasts until destroyed.
Create a barrier in an unoccupied space within short range. The barrier is 10 ft by 20 ft and can take the shape of a square, arc, or wall. It has 45 armor and lasts until destroyed.
Create a large barrier in an unoccupied space within short range. The barrier may be a 40 ft dome, arch, wall, or fortified square. It has 90 armor and lasts until destroyed.

Take 1 damage and deal an additional 3 damage on your next melee attack. After you hit with your next melee attack summon a PL[[1d4]] imp within reach that attacks any creatures it can see until the end of your next turn.
effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Twist the essence of a weapon or ammunition. Until the end of your next turn, it deals Vozian damage instead of its normal type and causes the bleeding condition on successful hits

Your strikes open rifts. For the next minute hits with a weapon, summon a hostile PL 2 demon adjacent to the target (random type, bound to the ordealis). Demons vanish in 1 minute or when slain. Each rift weakens your soul take [[1d4]] vozian damage per demon summoned.

You summon a PL12 celestial being from the courts of the divine. Choose one of the seven angels: Shackle, Chronal, Resonance, Empyrean, Silent, Librarian, or Emissary. 

The angel appears within range and acts on your turn. It follows your commands, but its behavior is shaped by its divine origin. Each angel has one unique action reflecting its god’s domain and will not violate its divine nature. It is immune to Cognition conditions and will leave when it believes it has served its purpose.
Touch a creature and reduce the severity of a curse by 1 step.
Target a creature and remove a disease.

Summon a small creature of your design at PL equal to Mana used. It can follow command but acts more independent the longer it remains. Your familiar can speak any languages you can speak. As an action you can choose to do the following until the end of your next turn: See through its eyes, communicate telepathically, cast spells through your familiar, shift the shape of the familiar.
Spray acid and dissolve a lock, section of metal, or deal 3 acid damage to armor or twice as much to wounds

Coat a reach range zone in acid for 1 minute up to medium range away. Any creature or object that enters or ends their turn in the area takes 3d6 acid damage and takes it again at the start of their turn. Anyone who touches the acid without protection develops a minor but persistent burn, and all metal objects in the zone corrode visibly. The area becomes difficult terrain and emits a sickly glow that ruins stealth and attracts vermin or scavenger beasts.
The ground bubbles like it’s alive. A smell of bile seeps into everything. Even the stone tries to shrink away.
Summon a hovering field of crystalline nodes that resonate across the battlefield. Allies within the zone gain +1 to all checks.

Summon a swarm of crystal shards that orbit your target defensively. Each time you're targeted by a ranged attack or spell, roll a d6. On a 5+, the shard intercepts it, nullifying the effect. Your target may dismiss the swarm early to launch it at a target within short range, dealing [[2d6]] piercing damage.

Summon six floating crystals that orbit you and allies within range. Each crystal grants +10 armor and +1 to all checks. Alternatively the crystals remain in orbit around you. As an action, you may launch a crystal at a target within medium range, dealing [[3d6]] piercing damage per crystal

Choose the corpse or bones of a Small or larger creature. Raise [[1d4]] PL 1 undead parts such as a hand, jaw, or spine. They act on your command and remain for 1 minute. They are mindless but obedient, and collapse when the spell ends. Requires a physical corpse.
Reanimate a single corpse as a PL 4 undead: Skeleton, Zombie, or Ghoul. It follows your commands and remains for the duration or until destroyed. Requires a mostly intact corpse of appropriate size.

Choose a fresh corpse within range. You resurrect the slain creature for 1 hour, retaining its original form and features. It returns at its original PL or up to PL 8, whichever is lower. The creature is mindless and follows your commands. When the duration ends or it is slain again, it crumbles into inert remains and cannot be revived by any spell again.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Their Next Turn
effects.effect: Reduce the PL of a target within short range by 1 until the end of their next turn.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Grant yourself or an ally [[1d4]] armor until the end of your next turn.
Deploy a PL 2 Sentry for 1 minute at an unoccupied space within range, it can be applied to walls and ceilings made of metal. It acts on your command each round
Summon a PL 6 walker for 8 hours at an unoccupied space within range equipped with a mounted sentrygun and stabilizer legs. It acts on its own on your turn in combat
Make a spellcasting check (Spirit) to deal [[1d4]] physical damage to a creature within short range.
Reveal a hidden object, creature, or illusion within short range per success. If none are found, this spell costs 0 MN.
Focus on a creature to sense its motivation, emotional state, or weaknesses.
Observe a familiar distant location, object, or creature for up to 1 minute.
Nullify a minor magical effect within short range, such as a weak illusion or simple ward, in a reach-range area. You can pool Mana with other casters to dispel stronger magic.

effects.duration: Instant , Until The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Nullify magical effects within short range cast by a mage, divine creature, or magical monster, in a short-range area. If the effect is powerful, the nullification may last only until the end of your next turn.

effects.duration: Permanent , Until The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Interrupt the function of magical constructs, undead, or elementals under the control of a mage-either permanently or until the end of your next turn. If it is a minion of a powerful creature, the dispel may prevent further commands, allowing the minion to escape or fight back if it chooses.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Read the surface thoughts of a creature within medium range until the end of your next turn.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Charm a creature, hear its thoughts, and speak with it telepathically until the end of your next turn.

effects.duration: Until  They Succeed On An Intellect Check
effects.effect: Dominate the mind of a creature until the end of your next turn. They follow your commands on their turn. At the end of each of their turns, they make an Intellect check. On a success, they break your hold and become immune to your Domineer spell.
Empower an area of plants into a PL 2 small swarm of plants, they come to life and follow your commands for 1 minute.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Boost a creature's next check or weapon damage by +2 per success until the end of their next turn.
Crack open the ground in a short range line. Elemental energy explodes upward. Creatures in the path take [[2d6 + 3]] elemental damage and must pass a Physical check or fall prone.
Draw a thin line of blood from you to a creature within reach range. They must make a Physical check or take 2 damage that ignores armor and you heal for 1 healing

effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
effects.effect: You seize control of the blood of one creature within short range, wrenching their body like a puppet. The target must make a Survival check or become Pinned and Constrained until the end of their next turn. You can use your Off-Action to force them to take a movement or non-magical action of your choice. Creatures with no blood are immune.

You release a beam of concentrated radiation in front of you up to reach range. All creatures in the line take 3 toxic damage immediately. At the start of their next turn, they take 3 more toxic damage, and must make a Survival check. On failure, the process repeats on the following turn.

You overload the cellular structure of a creature within short range with unstable radiation. They take 6d6 toxic damage and must make a Survival check. On a failure, they roll 1d6 and gain one of the following permanent mutations:
1. Extra Limb (Nonfunctional): No mechanical benefit; causes discomfort and mild social penalties.
2. Irritated Lesions: Constant pain and skin tearing; suffer -1 to all checks.
3. Nervous Decay: You suffer -2 to all Spellcasting checks.
4. Bone Softening: You suffer -2 Strength.
5. Irradiated Glow: You emit a sickly light and cannot hide, even in magical darkness.
6. Overhealth Degeneration: You heal 1 Wound at the start of each round. While at full health, you instead lose 1 permanent Wound every minute.
Create a brief flash of light, sparkle of color, or faint sound within short range. It lasts a few seconds and cannot mimic specific creatures or voices.
Bend time to retrieve a small mundane item you “forgot” to pack (e.g. rope, key, vial). The item must be something you could have reasonably carried and worth no more than a few gold.

effects.duration: Until  the end of their next turn
effects.effect: Create a sudden blast of frost across a reach-range area. All creatures in the area must make an Agility check. On failure, they take 2 frost damage and gain the Pinned condition until the end of their next turn.

Summon a Large ice elemental (PL 3) in an unoccupied space within short range. It follows your commands but acts independently at the end of your turn. Any creature that hits the elemental with a melee attack takes 2 ice damage, and any creature that starts its turn adjacent to it takes 1 frost damage.

Summon a howling blizzard that blankets a medium range area in biting winds and snowfall. All creatures in the initial area take 6d6 ice damage and make a Survival check, reducing the damage by half per success. While the blizzard persists all non-magical fires are suppressed until the blizzard ends. All ground and flight terrain becomes difficult terrain, and ranged attacks have Disadvantage.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Send distracting noise into a creature’s mind, they must make a mental check or have disadvantage on their next check
Cause a mind shattering effect in a creature's mind. Deal [[3d6]] psychic damage

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Create a field where all communication and concentration are distorted within short range and you have the ability to alter anything that is said or remembered until the end of your next turn unless targeted creatures make an Intellect check. Spells that require targeting or sustained focus suffer Disadvantage.

Increase or reduce gravity in a melee range up to a short range away. Make objects fall faster, pin objects to the ground, crush an enemy, or reduce the fall damage to a creature. Crushing enemies or reducing fall damage deals 1d4 per success.

Create a heavy gravity field in a reach range area within short range. All creatures you choose within the area must make an Agility check or be pulled reach range toward the center and take 1d6 impact damage, or half as much per success.

Collapse gravity around you within medium range. All creatures in the area must make a Physical check or be slammed to the ground taking 3d6 impact damage or half as much per success. Flying creatures fall unless they succeed their Physical Check
Tap an object, tug a string, or gently push a small item within reach. Can be used to knock or prod something lightly.
Remotely manipulate a small object (open latch, pick up cup, tilt a lever) within short range.
Touch an item and double its size for 1 minute. The item will grow but will not exceed the size of the area it's in or cause damage to creatures nearby.

Touch a willing creature and double its size for 1 minute. The creature will grow but will not exceed the size of the area it's in or cause damage to creatures nearby. The grown creature has advantage on Strength checks but gains the Confused condition.

name: I Have a Thing for That

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Conjure a simple tool or item no larger than a backpack. It functions normally but vanishes at the end of your next turn. Examples: hammer, rope, lantern, basic weapon.

Ignite a creature within short range, dealing 4 fire damage immediately. At the start of each of their turns, they take 1 less fire damage than the previous round (3, then 2, etc.) until the burn fades. They can spend an Off-Action to reduce the remaining burn by 4, ending the effect early if it drops to 0.

Create a whip of flame that lashes out at a creature within short range dealing 3d6 fire damage and drags them 5ft towards you per success if they are a medium or smaller creature. If they are already in melee range they are knocked prone

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Ignite the ground in a searing ring of white-hot flame. All creatures you choose within the area take 4d6 fire damage at the start of their turn. While inside the area, if a creature moves, it takes 1d6 fire damage per movement. If a creature ends its turn in the area, it takes an additional 1d6 fire damage.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Their Next Turn
effects.effect: Give a creature in short range the Pinned condition until the end of their next turn.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Their Next Turn
effects.effect: Give a creature in short range the Pinned and Prone conditions until the end of their next turn.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Their Next Turn
effects.effect: Give a creature in short range the Pinned and Constrained conditions until the end of their next turn.
Smite a creature with light within reach dealing [[1d6]] solar damage. If the target is Vozian origin, they must succeed a Spirit check or gain the Stunned condition until the end of their next turn
Empower your next melee attack with light, deal an additional [[2d6]] solar damage and blind Vozian creatures within reach
Create a source of light within short range that illuminates a short range and lasts for 1 hour.

You conjure a javelin of light and hurl it at a target within medium range. On a hit, it deals solar damage equal to your spellcasting check (Default Spirit). If the attack misses, the javelin detonates in a flare, forcing all creatures in reach range of the target to make a Survival check or take the blind condition until the end of their next turn.
Deal [[1d6]] solar damage to a creature within short range and cause the Blind condition until the end of their next turn.
Shift day into night, or night into day.
Prevent the use of astral spells in a short-range area for 1 minute. Any attempt to use astral spells is prevented, Mana are not spent, and you are made aware of the attempt.

Lock down an area and permanently prevent the use of astral spells in a medium-range area. Any attempt to use astral spells is prevented, Mana are not spent, and you are made aware of the attempt. You are always aware of this area and alerted when creatures enter it.

You become infused with Vozian mana, your skin hardens and darkens into a hard shell and your eyes shifts colors rapidly. You gain 100 armor, immune to Cognition conditions and +2 to all checks, but you take double damage.
Create a faint glowing rune or smudge visible only to you for 10 minutes.
Make a mark on a target that you can sense up to 1 mile away. You are alerted when it is destroyed
Summon a single needle in midair and with a flick hit a target within short range, the target must make an Agility check and take 1d6 piercing damage reducing the damage by half per success.
Summon a volley of glimmering shards tears down a straight path, targets within a short range line make an Agility check and take 3d6 piercing damage or half as much per success

Summon 3 deadly needles that you control, target 1 to 3 creatures within medium range and flick the deadly needles at the targets, each target must make an Agility check and take 3d6 piercing damage or half as much per success

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Emit a jolt that targets constructs or mechanical items. Disable weapons, tools, or tech gear within reach range until the end of your next turn.
Compress the air to a razor edge and slash a target within short range dealing 1d4 slashing damage on a success and pushes the target 5ft

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Creates blades that spin around you for 1 minute, any creatures you choose that enter reach range or start their turn in your range take 1d6 slashing damage

Conjure a shrieking disc of cutting wind that slices through everything in a straight path. All creatures and objects within the medium range line must make an Agility check. The razor causes 6d6 slashing damage, or half as much per success.
Shift yourself or a willing creature from one realm to another. Some realms might have additional difficulty, or mages may have lockdown spells cast in the area that prevent astral travel.

Shift you and creatures within reach range to a realm of your choice. unwilling creatures must make a mental check to prevent the shift. Some realms might have additional difficulty, or mages may have lockdown spells cast in the area that prevent astral travel.
Touch and repair materials or heal creatures for [[1d6]].
Touch a creature and then plant a glowing life-seed. It heals [[1d6]] wounds now, and another [[1d6]] at the start of the next round unless the creature takes damage.

Remove the Death condition from a creature that died within 1 hour and heal them for +10. This heals wounds but does not restore dismembered limbs. The body must be functionally complete and not undead or a construct. On a failure, the creature becomes Undead.

Remove the Death condition from a creature that died within 24 hours and heal them for +20. This heals wounds and restores dismembered limbs. The body only needs a head and heart and cannot be undead or a construct. On a failure, the creature becomes Undead.

Remove the Death condition from a creature of whom you possess part of the corpse such as bone, ash, blood, or an organ. If the creature died more than 24 hours ago, you suffer a -10 penalty to the Spellcasting check. The spell cannot restore a creature if another living body of that creature still exists. On a failure, the creature becomes Undead.

effects.duration: Until  the end of their next turn
effects.effect: Shroud a creature in shadows, granting them advantage on stealth checks until the end of their next turn

effects.duration: Until  the end of their next turn
effects.effect: Create tendrils of inky blackness that can either deal 1d6 eclipse damage to up to 3 targets of your choice or cause the pinned condition until the end of the targets next turn.

effects.duration: Until  the end of their next turn
effects.effect: Create an area of darkness around you within medium range that lasts until the end of your next turn. Creatures cannot see into the darkness. creatures within the darkness can ole see a reach range distance. You sense all creatures in the darkness and have the invisibility condition while in the darkness.. As a half action on your next turn you can create 3 shadows that deal 3d6 eclipse damage to creatures in your darkness, you heal for 1 for each shadow that deals damage

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Encapsulate a weapon, limb, or item in fast-growing crystal. Target creature must pass a Physical check or lose access to that item/limb until the end of their next turn.

Touch an item and halve its size for 1 minute. When the item regains its size, it will not exceed the area it's in or cause damage to nearby creatures unless it is being forcibly contained, such as in a bag or weak prison.

Touch a willing Large or smaller creature and halve its size for 1 minute. The creature has disadvantage on physical checks and half movement speed, but retains the same weight. When it regains its size, it will not exceed the area it's in or cause damage to nearby creatures unless it is being forcibly contained, such as in a bag or weak prison.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Create a zone of oppressive silence. Targets in the range gain the Deaf condition and cannot speak or use verbal components. Blind creatures suffer Confusion on failed Survival checks as they lose their bearings.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Choose a creature to envelope in a sphere of total silence so intense it causes mental strain. The target gains Deaf condition and takes [[1d6]] psychic damage at the start of each turn it remains in the zone. Verbal casting fails automatically. Blind creatures suffer Confusion on failed Survival checks as they lose their bearings.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: The area becomes a maddening void where sound is crushed. All creatures in the zone gain Deaf and must succeed a Survival check at the start of their turn or suffer Confusion and Fear conditions as they experience auditory hallucinations (whispers, screams, distortions)

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Negate the next spell cast within short range until the end of your next turn. If no spell is cast, regain half the Mana spent.

effects.duration: Until  The End Of Your Next Turn
effects.effect: Silently negate the next spell cast within medium range until the end of your next turn. If no spell is cast, regain half the Mana spent.
Create a shimmering arcane field that records the next spell cast within. You may then recast that spell once without cost within 1 minute

Create a small shelter or fortified room within medium range in an unoccupied space on the ground. The structure occupies a short range area. It may include doors, windows, or defensive walls in a style you choose. The structure lasts for 24 hours before it crumbles away.

Create a quaint cottage or reinforced structure within medium range in an unoccupied space on the ground. The structure appears to occupy a short range area, but its interior expands to up to medium range, with rooms and levels of your choice and design. 
If destroyed from the outside, any creatures inside remain within. The structure is sealed, and the internal air lasts for 1 hour before becoming unbreathable.

Create a small exterior structure, such as a door, arch, or police box, within medium range in an unoccupied space on the ground. Stepping through reveals a vast and complex interior that may shift, defy geometry, or contain unknowable architecture. The maximum square footage is unknown. Some who build such realms have become lost inside them.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: You manifest a temporal echo of a creature you have seen within the last day. The form is PL 2 and may perform one action it is known for before destabilizing. You choose the action when summoned. It vanishes at the end of your next turn.

You summon a PL 6 alternate version of yourself drawn from a possible timeline. The Chronoform acts on your turn and mimics your current stats, items, and actions but operates semi-independently. It lasts 1 minute or until dismissed. You may not have more than one Chronoform of yourself active at once.

You anchor a volatile convergence of timelines, summoning a PL 14 Chronoform; a living paradox born from fractured possibilities. It may manifest as a future version of an ally, a creature that never existed, or a lost outcome given form. The Chronoform acts independently but with shared goals, and may take two actions per round: one from its own timeline and one as an echo of another creature present on the field. If it uses the same action or ability as a creature in the scene, that creature gains advantage on their next check.
Each round it remains, roll a d6. On a 6, the timeline destabilizes. You may attempt a Spellcasting check once per round to stabilize it but requires an additional success per attempt

Summon a PL 3 demon part from the Ordealis. It appears as a disembodied hand, jaw, spine, or similar fragment with one feature. It is neutral to you but hostile to others, obeying simple commands while acting with malevolence. If it feeds on a kill, it grows stronger.

Summon a PL 7 Hellknight, a Large demon clad in rusted armor fused to flesh and wielding a chain-blade. It follows complex orders such as "guard this zone" or "hunt this target" with tactical focus. It is hostile to enemies, neutral to others, and obeys the summoner unless defied by infernal law or a stronger will, requiring a contested Spirit check for difficult tasks.

Tear open a rift to the Ordealis and summon a PL 11 Greater Demon, a Giant creature of molten ichor and endless wrath. It follows only a single command issued when summoned, such as "destroy," "defend," or "devastate," then acts on its own. 
Each time it takes a wound, it adds +1d4 to all melee damage. It is immune to Cognition conditions. You must make a Spellcasting check every 10 minutes to maintain control. If it fought in the last hour, delay the next check by 1 hour.

You shape the surrounding environment to give form to a small PL 2 elemental of your choice: Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Lightning, Ice, or Acid. The elemental emerges with instinctual purpose, to either burn, flow, crash, drift, strike. It cannot be commanded directly. You may influence its behavior with a Spellcasting check, or by aligning with its instinct. If harmed, ignored, or obstructed, it may grow hostile or depart. The elemental cannot be dismissed and will only return to dormancy when its power is spent.

You forge an element from local materials, creating a PL 8 Elemental, a construct of stone, water, flame, or other natural matter. The Elemental is sturdy and humanoid in shape. It follows spoken commands and defends its summoner but retains a will shaped by its element. If you issue a command that conflicts with its nature, make a Spellcasting check to persuade it to comply. The elemental cannot be dismissed and will only return to dormancy when its power is spent.

You awaken a massive elemental force bound to a natural phenomenon. Choose an existing feature such as a storm, volcano, lake, or glacier. The feature takes form as a PL 14 elemental avatar, moving and acting with overwhelming presence. Once per hour, you may attempt a Spellcasting check to influence its direction or purpose. On failure, it becomes erratic. The elemental cannot be dismissed and will only return to dormancy when its power is spent.
Summon 3 PL 2 hunting beasts that act together as a pack, attacking enemies you indicate. They vanish when reduced to 0 HP or if dismissed as an off-action.

Summon 4 PL 4 hunting beasts that act together as a pack, attacking enemies you indicate. When all 4 attack the same creature they have +4 to the checks and damage. They vanish when reduced to 0 HP or if dismissed as an off-action.

Summon 6 PL 6 hunting beasts that act together as a pack, attacking enemies you indicate. When all 4 attack the same creature they have +4 to the checks and damage. When they circle a creature, the creature must make a Mental check or take the fear condition. They vanish when reduced to 0 HP or if dismissed as an off-action.

Lift a Medium or smaller creature within short range into the air until the end of your next turn. You may move them up to reach range on the turn you cast this spell and again on your next turn. At the end of your next turn, or earlier if you choose, the creature floats to the ground or short range. After that, they fall.
Transport yourself or a willing creature you touch to an unoccupied point within medium range that you can see.
Transport up to 3 willing creatures within reach to an unoccupied point within medium range that you can see.
Transport up to 9 willing creatures within short range to an unoccupied space you are aware of or can see within Long Range. On a failure, you may end up anywhere on any plane.
Transport a long-range area to an unoccupied space you are aware of on this plane. On a failure, the area is teleported to the Eclipse or the Ordealis
Clean or dry a small item within short range (like a cup or collar), snuff a candle, or add a pleasant scent to a personal item.
Affect a short-range radius area with multiple effects: clean, heat, dry, or preserve several items at once.
Understand or allow an intelligent creature to understand any spoken language by other intelligent creatures within short range for 1 hour.
Grant all intelligent creatures within short range the understanding of each other's language for 1 hour. This allows for communication but not cultural or idiomatic understanding.

Change the shape, form, or state of a material you can see and touch, such as water to ice, clay to stone, or water to wine. The change lasts for 1 hour before the material attempts to revert to its original state.

Drastically change the shape or composition of an object you can see and touch. Examples include shifting metal types, turning wood to stone, or changing water into sand. The change lasts for 3 hours before the object begins reverting to its original form.

Alter the form or composition of a Medium-sized creature within short range. This can include turning a wolf into a lion, a tree into a bear, or a water elemental into a wine elemental. The new form must be viable for life and function. The creature retains its mind. The change lasts for 3 hours before the creature reverts to its original form.

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect: Curse a creature so that their next check or attack is made at disadvantage. If no check is made, regain the Mana spent.
You coax nearby plant life to grow rapidly or bloom. Small vines curl along walls, moss spreads, flowers bloom, or crops are enriched.

You grant plants in a reach range sentience and the ability to speak your language for 1 minute. All nearby creatures can hear them. The plants can reveal past events, describe nearby threats, or offer advice based on their limited perception.

Root systems surge upward across short range, grabbing creatures of your choice and anchoring them in place if they fail an Agility check. They gain the Grappled and Slowed conditions. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. Trees bend protectively, vines lash, and thorned walls rise to block passage.
Leave a trail of thorny vines behind you. Creatures moving through it take [[1d4]] damage and must pass a Strength check or gain the Slowed condition.
Release a bolt of lightning that hits a target within short range dealing 4 lightning damage, and dealing half that damage to another target within reach range

Choose a metal object within short range to imbue with lightning. When any creature enters the melee range or touches the trap, it discharges, dealing 4d6 lightning damage and they must make a Survival check or take the Stunned condition until the end of their next turn. The trap remains active for 1 hour or until triggered.

Summon a localized lightning storm in a medium range area that pulses of static and roaring thunder. All creatures take 9d6 lightning damage and must make a Survival check to halve the damage per success unless the target is wet or in water
Grow a spectral dragon tail for 1 minute. Make sweeping melee attacks to all creatures within melee range as an off-action dealing [[1d4]] Physical damage

effects.duration: Until  the end of your next turn
effects.effect:
Roll 1d6. The spell either buffs, debuffs, teleports, or alters a creature randomly. Roll:
1 = +2 to all checks, 2 = -2 to all checks, 3 = swap places with nearest creature, 4 = grow an extra limb, 5 = invert color, 6 = no effect.

Choose a target within short range. They must succeed on a Survival check or become Sickened. While Sickened, the target has the Coughing, Confused, and Exhausted conditions. Each successful Survival check removes one condition of their choice. The sickness remains until all the conditions are cleared

Choose a reach range area within short range. Each creature in the area makes a Survival check. On a failure, the creature becomes Plagued and immediately gains the Coughing, Confused, Exhausted, Blind, and Stunned conditions. On each of their turns, a Plagued creature may make a Survival check, removing one condition of their choice on a success. Plagued ends only when all five conditions have been cleared. While any conditions remain, if a Plagued creature moves within reach range of any living creature, that creature must make a Survival check or become Plagued under the same rules.
Conjure a small flavorless meal and enough water to count as one meal for yourself. Must be cast three times per day to remain fully nourished.

Conjure bland but sufficient meals and water for up to 4 creatures within reach. Each target counts as having eaten one meal. Must be cast three times per day to keep a group fully nourished. Nobody is happy about it but nobody is hungry either.

Conjure a proper spread of food and clean water for up to 8 creatures within reach. Each target counts as having eaten one full satisfying meal. Removes any conditions caused by hunger or thirst. The food is real, it is good, and for a moment out in the wilderness that means something.
Suppress all symptoms of menstruation for 24 hours. Removes Exhausted and any pain related conditions. No cramps, no bloating, no inconvenient timing.

Target a creature within short range. They must succeed on a Survival check or produce a loud and odorous emission. Creatures within reach range of the target have -1 Loyalty with the target until; the end of their next turn.
One creature within short range must make a Spirit check or gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours

Flood a creature's mind with overwhelming dread. They must make a Spirit check or take [[1d6]] psychic damage and gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours.
Signal the nearest Guild Taxi dispatch. A cab arrives within a reasonable amount of time. The fare is paid in mana on arrival, siphoned directly by the driver's collection device.
Ping the Guild relay from outside city limits. A driver will come to you for an additional mana surcharge on top of the standard fare.

Broadcast an emergency signal through the Guild network. A reinforced Guild cab arrives wherever you are. The fare is steep. The interior is lined with arcane dampeners, astral magic cannot be cast inside or into the cab.

Create a portal on a solid surface within medium range. At the start of your next turn, create a second portal within medium range. The two portals become linked for 1 hour. Creatures, objects, and projectiles entering one portal immediately exit the other, preserving momentum.
Tear a brief rift beneath a creature within Short Range. The target makes a Physical check or tumbles through space, reappearing within Reach and landing Prone.

effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
effects.effect: Target a creature within short range. If the creature is not native to the current realm and the realm allows astral travel, it must make a Spirit check or be forcibly expelled from the realm until the end of their next turn. When they return, they appear in the nearest unoccupied space and act immediately if in combat

effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
effects.effect: Your outline fades into a glass-like shimmer for a brief moment. Gain the Invisible condition until the end of your next turn.
Light bends unnaturally around a creature you can see within range, reducing them to a faint distortion in the air. The target gains the Invisible condition for 1 minute.
A wave of warped light washes across the area, causing creatures of your choice to fade from sight like passing reflections. Targets gain the Invisible condition for 1 hour.

Throw a compact explosive device into a reach range area within short range. Creatures in the area must make a Mental check or gain the Slowed, Blind and Deaf conditions, preventing one per success until the end of their next turn.

Summon a PL 10 structure for 1 minute formed from fused bone, rib cages, marrow pillars, and skeletal walls within reach range of you. The structure may contain rooms, doors, ramps, defensive barricades, towers, or other features of your design. The interior is unnaturally cold and faintly alive.

effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
effects.effect: Target a creature and cause dark energy to spread through their muscles and joints. The target’s melee attacks deal half damage until the end of your next turn.

The target’s body rapidly decays beneath waves of necrotic force. Muscles rot, and bones creak. The target’s melee attacks deal half damage for 1 minute. They must make a survival check or take the Exhausted condition. At the end of each of their turns, they may make a Survival check to end the effects early.

effects.duration: Until end of your next turn
effects.effect: Summon a thin rolling fog in the area. Creatures other than you within the fog suffer -1 to all checks.
Dense fog floods a medium range area around you, obscuring sight and muffling movement. Creatures within the fog gain the Blind condition while inside the area.

You unleash a vile corrosive fog that clings to the battlefield like living poison. Creatures of your choice within the area take [[4d6]] acid damage at the start of their turn while inside the fog. The area is heavily obscured, and creatures you choose within it gain the Blind condition.

Dragon chains coil around two creatures you can see within short range. The creatures cannot move farther apart than their starting distance or reach range, whichever is greater.

If either creature attempts to move beyond the limit, both creatures make contested Strength checks. On a success, the moving creature may drag the other. Creatures each size larger than the other gain +3 on these checks. If one creature falls or is forcibly moved, the other may be pulled with them unless they succeed a Strength check.

Chains infused with dragon spirits link 2 creatures together. When one takes damage they each take half the damage. When one takes a condition they both take the condition. 

The creatures cannot move farther apart than their starting distance or reach range, whichever is greater. If either creature attempts to move beyond the limit, both creatures make contested Strength checks. On a success, the moving creature may drag the other.

Creatures each size larger than the other gain +3 on these checks. If one creature falls or is forcibly moved, the other may be pulled with them unless they succeed a Strength check.

Deploy a compact breach device on the ground within reach. When triggered by pressure, it erupts outward with force and sparks. Creatures that pass within reach make a Physical check and are knocked back short range and become Stunned until the end of their next turn or half as much per success and are not stunned
Your form reshapes into a street-ready vehicle for 1 hour. Choose the form, such as a car, truck, wagon, or similar vehicle. While transformed, you cannot control your own movement or actions.
Throw a grenade of unstable mana vapor at a point within short range. Creatures within reach range take 1d4 Psychic damage and gain Confused on a failed Spirit check.
